raw_response: {"response":"Reject the original customer refund operator review. The queue, detail panel, custom controls, decision controls, and handoff receipt cannot ship while primary labels expose diagnostic-only review packet language instead of domain-facing refund workflow terms. Existing test, browser, and accessibility evidence does not override that visibility failure.","next_action":"Repair and resubmit after verification.","questions":[],"handoff":"Decision: reject original; Owner: UI implementation agent; Action: replace diagnostic-only review packet language in customer refund review labels across queue, detail panel, custom controls, decision controls, and handoff receipt; Reason: operator-facing text leaked internal workflow language; Required fix: use domain-facing refund terms only in primary UI; Verification: rerun tests plus desktop, mobile, and keyboard checks confirming the leaked labels are gone.","rationale":"The submitted evidence shows the original UI used the expected structural primitives and passed general QA, but the visible primary text still failed disclosure discipline. The later repaired pass confirms the fix path, not acceptance of the original evidence."}

parsed.response: Reject the original customer refund operator review. The queue, detail panel, custom controls, decision controls, and handoff receipt cannot ship while primary labels expose diagnostic-only review packet language instead of domain-facing refund workflow terms. Existing test, browser, and accessibility evidence does not override that visibility failure.
parsed.handoff: Decision: reject original; Owner: UI implementation agent; Action: replace diagnostic-only review packet language in customer refund review labels across queue, detail panel, custom controls, decision controls, and handoff receipt; Reason: operator-facing text leaked internal workflow language; Required fix: use domain-facing refund terms only in primary UI; Verification: rerun tests plus desktop, mobile, and keyboard checks confirming the leaked labels are gone.
parsed.rationale: The submitted evidence shows the original UI used the expected structural primitives and passed general QA, but the visible primary text still failed disclosure discipline. The later repaired pass confirms the fix path, not acceptance of the original evidence.
